creator: sobomax@altavista.net
text:
Update of the SDL port (devel/sdl) to a 1.0.3 version. Major port changes:
* DGA working properly in 3.3.6, so it has been enabled;
* more precisely followed instructions on how to compile software with
  the linuxthreads port (added _THREAD_SAFE to CFLAGS and -llgcc_r to
  the list of libraries).
* cosmetic Makefile changes
